compressed_prompt:
draft an unconventional resume for Antonia Maj for a coffee co. job; marketing, customer service, sales exp; no coffee-related major. sections: 'section 1', 'section 2'. format: 
* quirky achievements
* unique coffee-related hobbies
response:
**ANTONIA MAJ**
*"Brewing Connections, One Cup at a Time"*
📍 [Your Location] | 📧 [Your Email] | 🔗 [LinkedIn/Portfolio] | ☕ [Personal Coffee Blog/Instagram, if applicable]

---

### **SECTION 1: THE UNCONVENTIONAL BREW**
*(Why I’m the human espresso shot your team needs—bold, energizing, and impossible to ignore.)*

**🔥 Quirky Achievements (That Somehow Prove I’m Coffee-Adjacent)**
- **Sold 500+ "Mystery Coffee" subscriptions** in 3 months by turning customer service into a choose-your-own-adventure game. (*"Is your vibe ‘moody indie film’ or ‘sunrise yoga’? Here’s your roast."*)
- **Taught a barista crash course** to a team of 10 at a pop-up café—using only a French press, a mason jar, and a TikTok tutorial. (Spoiler: They all survived.)
- **Turned a corporate retreat into a latte art competition** (judged by the CEO). Won second place with a *questionable* portrait of a corgi. (First place went to the guy who drew a heart. Unoriginal.)
- **Cold-called 200+ small businesses** to pitch a "Coffee & Collab" pop-up series. 15 said yes. 3 became repeat clients. (*"No" just means "not right now."*)
- **Wrote a 10-page "Coffee Manifesto"** for a friend’s café rebrand—complete with doodles of beans as superheroes. They framed it. (Ask me about "The Dark Roast Avenger.")
- **Survived a week as a "Coffee Sommelier"** at a wedding expo, pairing single-origin beans with cake flavors. (*"This Ethiopian Yirgacheffe? It’s the *champagne* of coffee. Also, it pairs well with divorce."*)
- **Organized a "Blind Taste Test" fundraiser** where participants guessed roast levels for charity. Raised $800. (I may have rigged it. Don’t tell anyone.)
- **Created a "Coffee Personality Quiz"** that went mildly viral (5K shares). (*"You’re a caramel macchiato: sweet but secretly complex."*)
- **Negotiated a sponsorship deal** with a local roaster by trading my *legendary* homemade cold brew recipe. (They still use it. I still get free beans.)
- **Hosted a "Coffee & Chaos" podcast** for 6 episodes—interviewing baristas, roasters, and one very confused tea enthusiast. (*"We had a 30% listener retention rate. Progress!"*)

**☕ Unique Coffee-Related Hobbies (Because Yes, I Have a Problem)**
- **DIY Coffee Roasting:** I own a popcorn machine I *definitely* only use for popcorn. (*"It’s for science."*)
- **Coffee Cocktails:** Inventing drinks like the *"Espresso Martini 2.0"* (add a dash of orange bitters and regret). Currently working on a *"Latte Negroni."*
- **Coffee Travel Blog:** Documenting the best (and weirdest) coffee shops in every city I visit. (*"This place serves their pour-over in a *shoe*. 0/10."*)
- **Bean-to-Bar Chocolate Pairing:** Because if you’re going to have a caffeine addiction, you might as well pair it with *another* addiction.
- **Coffee Art:** Not latte art—*actual* art. My sketchbook is 60% coffee stains, 30% doodles of beans with faces, 10% existential dread.
- **Coffee Book Club:** A group of friends who read books *about* coffee (e.g., *The World Atlas of Coffee*) and then drink coffee *while* discussing them. (*"This chapter on processing methods is *almost* as good as the Ethiopian I’m sipping."*)
- **Coffee Memes:** I run a private Instagram account dedicated to coffee puns. (*"Resting Barista Face." "Bean There, Brewed That."*)
- **Coffee Subscription Side Hustle:** Curating "mystery boxes" for friends with obscure single-origin beans. (*"This one’s from a farm in Guatemala that may or may not be haunted."*)
- **Coffee & Vinyl Nights:** Pairing records with roasts. (*"This Kenyan AA goes *perfectly* with Fleetwood Mac."*)
- **Coffee Therapy:** My therapist and I have an unspoken rule: If I bring her a cortado, she pretends not to notice when I cry into it.

---

### **SECTION 2: THE PROOF IS IN THE POUR**
*(Where I pretend my unrelated experience is secretly coffee experience in disguise.)*

**📈 Marketing & Sales: Turning Caffeine Into Cash**
- **Retail Marketing Guru** | *Fashion Brand* (2021–2023)
  - Increased Instagram engagement by 200% by treating product launches like *coffee tastings*—teasing "flavor notes" of fabrics (*"This linen dress? Bright, citrusy, with a hint of ‘I woke up like this.’"*).
  - Designed a "Build-Your-Own-Bundle" campaign that boosted AOV by 35%. (*"Pick 3 items, get a free tote—like a coffee flight, but for clothes."*)
  - Trained sales team to upsell using *coffee shop tactics*: *"Would you like to add the matching scarf? It’s like upgrading from a drip coffee to a flat white."*

- **Customer Experience Alchemist** | *Tech Startup* (2019–2021)
  - Reduced churn by 15% by implementing a "Coffee Chat" onboarding call—where I’d literally brew coffee while explaining the product. (*"Nothing says ‘trust’ like a stranger watching you sip a latte."*)
  - Created a "Customer Love" newsletter with *actual* handwritten notes (and coffee stains). Open rate: 45%. (*"People kept them. I’m not sure if that’s sweet or concerning."*)

**🤝 Customer Service: Making Every Interaction Feel Like a Third-Wave Café**
- **Barista-Adjacent** | *Local Café* (2018–2019)
  - Memorized 80+ regulars’ orders. (*"The usual, Dave? Oat milk latte, extra hot, no foam, with a side of existential dread?"*)
  - Increased tips by 25% by drawing *terrible* latte art on cups. (*"I can’t draw, but I *can* make people laugh—and that’s the real art."*)
  - Trained new hires using *improv games* to build confidence. (*"If you can handle a Karen demanding a ‘non-fat, sugar-free, gluten-free, dairy-free, joy-free’ drink, you can handle anything."*)

**💡 Freelance & Side Hustles: Because Capitalism Demands Creativity**
- **Coffee Consultant** | *Pop-Up Cafés & Small Businesses* (2020–Present)
  - Helped a friend’s café rebrand from *"Generic Coffee"* to *"The Cozy Bean"*—complete with a new menu, merch, and a *very* aggressive loyalty punch card.
  - Designed a "Coffee & Conversations" event series that sold out in 48 hours. (*"Bring your first date, your breakup, or your existential crisis—we’ve got a roast for that."*)
- **Content Creator** | *Coffee & Lifestyle* (2021–Present)
  - Grew a coffee Instagram to 10K followers by posting *unhinged* captions. (*"This pour-over is so good, I almost forgave my ex."*)
  - Wrote a viral blog post: *"How to Order Coffee Like You Actually Know What You’re Doing"* (spoiler: *you don’t*).

---

### **🎯 WHY HIRE ME?**
I don’t have a coffee degree, but I *do* have:
✅ **A sixth sense for what makes people loyal** (hint: it’s not just the caffeine).
✅ **The ability to turn mundane tasks into *experiences*** (see: my "Coffee Personality Quiz").
✅ **A brain that thinks in coffee metaphors** (*"This project is like a cold brew—slow to start, but *worth the wait*."*).
✅ **The hustle of someone who’s worked retail, startups, and cafés**—aka, I can handle *any* kind of chaos.
✅ **A genuine obsession with coffee culture**—not just the drink, but the *people*, the rituals, the *stories* behind every cup.

**Let’s make your brand the place where customers don’t just buy coffee—they *belong*.**

---
**P.S.** If you hire me, I promise to:
- Bring my own *questionable* latte
